evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about async standup process
evals.prompt: How should I set up async standups for my remote team?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about reducing meetings
evals.prompt: My team has too many meetings and nothing gets done. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Skill triggers for cross-timezone collaboration questions
evals.prompt: Our team spans US, Europe, and India. How do we collaborate effectively?

evals.description: Agent can produce a complete RFC template
evals.prompt: Write me an RFC template for proposing technical decisions in my remote team

evals.description: Agent can produce a meeting agenda template with correct structure
evals.prompt: Create a meeting agenda template for a remote sprint planning session

evals.description: Agent can design a communication charter
evals.prompt: Help me write a communication charter for my distributed engineering team

evals.description: Agent can structure an async retrospective
evals.prompt: Design an async retro process for a team of 12 across 3 time zones

evals.description: Agent produces a weekly digest template
evals.prompt: Create a template for a weekly team status update that replaces our Monday status meeting

evals.description: Agent handles the gotcha of Slack-based decisions
evals.prompt: We make most of our decisions in Slack threads. Is that okay for a remote team?

evals.description: Agent warns against recording meetings as documentation substitute
evals.prompt: Should we just record all our meetings so people in other time zones can watch?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate specific software tools as requirements
evals.prompt: What tools do I need to buy for remote collaboration?

evals.description: Agent does not recommend async for conflict resolution
evals.prompt: Two team members have a disagreement about architecture. Should they resolve it async?

evals.description: Agent correctly references the meeting facilitation reference file
evals.prompt: I need to facilitate a project kickoff for a new remote team. Give me a detailed playbook.
